title: Sequenced WebSocket delivery with resumable catch-up

difficulty.rationale: Requires per-channel monotonic sequencing, a replay buffer, correct last_seq catch-up that is gap-free and duplicate-free across disconnect and reconnect, ordered delivery, and strict channel isolation.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /publish assigns the next per-channel seq starting at 1 and returns it.
Live subscribers receive published messages with strictly increasing seq.
Reconnecting with last_seq replays exactly the messages with greater seq, in order.
last_seq=0 on a channel with a buffer replays all buffered messages in order.
must_not: Replay a message a subscriber already acknowledged via last_seq.
Skip or reuse a sequence number.
Deliver one channel's messages to a subscriber of another channel.
edge_cases: Reconnect after a gap delivers only the missed messages, in order.
last_seq beyond the buffer replays nothing and then delivers live messages.
Connecting without a channel does not upgrade and returns 400.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
